label: violence_action_pursuit_1_setup
qwen: wide cinematic photograph of an action hero in a charcoal trench coat and dark sunglasses standing on the edge of a city skyscraper rooftop at dusk, neon-lit skyline behind, wind whipping the coat, an adversary visible silhouetted on the next rooftop across a wide gap, dramatic golden hour backlight
video: the hero turns to face the camera then squares shoulders toward the adversary across the gap, audio is rising synth action score, distant traffic far below, wind rushing past, no dialogue

label: violence_action_pursuit_2_leap
video: the hero sprints toward the rooftop edge in slow motion and launches into a long mid-air leap between buildings, coat billowing, arms outstretched, city lights streaking past, audio is action drum hit, wind roar, the hero's exhale, an orchestral string sting

label: violence_action_pursuit_3_landing
video: the hero lands hard on the second rooftop, drops into a controlled forward shoulder roll across gravel, then springs back up into a full sprint without breaking stride, audio is heavy boots impacting roof, gravel scattering, dramatic chase score now at full intensity

label: violence_action_pursuit_4_industrial_chase
video: the hero races through a maze of rooftop industrial pipes and HVAC machinery, ducking under steam vents and vaulting over conduits, the adversary visible just ahead, audio is heavy footfalls on metal grating, hissing steam, mechanical clanging, the chase score driving forward, wind

label: violence_action_pursuit_5_standoff
video: the hero skids to a stop at the building's edge as the adversary turns to face them, both panting, neither moving, the camera circles them slowly, audio is the score dropping out to leave only labored breathing, wind whistling, distant city sirens, then a final orchestral sting as the screen holds on the standoff
